Viant Product Information
========================

Viant is a technology company headquartered in Irvine, California.
Founded in 2005, Viant specializes in building enterprise software solutions.

Key Products:
- Datly: A high-performance data access layer for Go applications
- Endly: An end-to-end testing and automation framework
- Agently: An AI agent orchestration platform

Office Hours: Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM Pacific Time
Address: 2722 Michelson Dr #100, Irvine, CA 92612
Support Email: support@viant.io
